titleStmt.title: SII 38.292: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 292. (A.R. No. 292 of 1912.) KUṞAṄGAṆIMUṬṬAM, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Koyyāmalarīśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription contains a royal order. It refers to the gift of five vēli of tax free land called Oruppuḍaiyāṉ to the Kuraṅgaṇimuṭṭamuḍaiya nāyanār temple at Tirukkuraṅgaṇimuṭṭam in Māveṇḍūrpaṟṟu in Ērīkīḻ-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Kāliyūrkōṭṭam, for conducting daily rituals and services, providing food offerings and other services to the god. It is also stated that the land tax of twenty-five poṉ along with other taxes, such as taṟi-iṟai, upādi-viṉiyōgam, śekkiṟai, taṭṭoli, taṭṭār-pāṭṭam, iḍaivari, iṉavari, ērimīṉ-pāṭṭam, kāṇikkai, kāttigaippachchai, pañjipīli, ōlaieḻuttu, viṉiyōgam, vāsaṟpēṟu, ilāñjiṉaippēṟu, āṉaichchālai, kuduraippatti, āḷvari, maṉaivari, āḷttāḻvu, tachchttāḻvu, kaḍaiāyam, and other taxes were exempted.
Tuñjalūr uḍaiyāṉ and Pallavarāyaṉ figure as signatories of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvanacakravattikonerme koṇṭāṉ
kāliyūrkoṭṭattu Erikiḻnāṭṭu māveṇṭurpaṟṟil
tirukkuraṅkaṇimuṭṭamuṭaiya (ṭaiya)ār tirukkuraṅkaṇi
muṭṭamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Irācarāca
ṉ peruvaḻikku merkku kuṇṭiyāṟṟukku vaṭakku tūciyel
laikku kiḻakku Eṭṭitāṅkal teṉpāṟk(l)ellaikkut terku
nāṉṅ(ku) Ellaikku Uḷ tirunāmattukkāṇiyum tiruviruppu
m cūḻnta tirumaṭaiviḷākattālum naṉcaiṉilam puṉcai
ṉilattāluIt appears that the engraver at first wrote ‘ḷu', but later realising the mistake be changed it to ‘lu'm Iṉṉā(ā)yanārkkum palapaṭi nitta nimantaṅkaḷu
kkum Amutupaṭi tiruppaṇikkum Oruppuṭaiyaṉ nilam Ai
veliyum pattāvatu Āṭimātam mutal Innāyaṉāṟku mu
talaṭaṅka Iṟaiyili Ākat tantu Iṉṉilam Aiyvelikkum
niccayippāṉ poṉ Irupattaiñcum Innilattālum It tiru
viruppu tirumaṭaiviḷākattālum varum Upāti viṉiyo
kam taṟiiṟai cekkiṟai taṭ(ṭu)ṭoli taṭṭārppāṭṭam Iṭaivari
Iṉavari Erimīṉpāṭṭam kāṇikkai kāttikaippaccai pañcipi
li Olaieḻuttu viṉivokam vācaṟpeṟu Ilāñciṉaip
peṟu Āṉaiccālai kuturaipatti Āḷvari maṉaivari Āḷ
tāḻvu taccuttāḻvu kaṭaiāyam maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa I
ṟaikaḷum Iṉṉāḷ mutal ṉam variyilārkkaṇakkilum kaḻi
ttu mutalaṭaṅkaiṟaiyili Ākat tantomaṭṭikkuṉānakka El
laiyil munputai tiruccūlatāvaṉappaṭiye cantirāti
ttavarai cella kallilumcempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu
tom Ivai tuñcalūr Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu yāṉa ttavalu
tāya § Ivai pallavarāyar Eḻuttu tullīyam § cimāyecura rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 38.292 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
